ast.source: Initiate Sync
ast.target: 开始同步

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Customize
ast.target: 自定义

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Connect
ast.target: 连接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On first sync, the ReClipped plugin will create a new folder containing all your annotations
ast.target: 首次同步时，ReClipped 插件将创建一个新文件夹，其中包含您所有的标注。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the plugin will save all your annotations into a folder named ReClipped
ast.target: 默认情况下，插件会将您所有的标注保存到一个名为 ReClipped 的文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, ReClipped will create Platform and Channel folders
ast.target: 如果启用，ReClipped 将创建平台和频道文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugin will use /Channels, and /Platforms folder respectively by default
ast.target: 插件默认将分别使用 /Channels 和 /Platforms 文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If not set to Manual, ReClipped will automatically resync with Obsidian when the app is open at the specified interval
ast.target: 如果未设置为手动，当应用在指定间隔打开时，ReClipped 将自动与 Obsidian 重新同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, ReClipped will automatically resync with Obsidian each time you open the app
ast.target: 如果启用，每次打开应用时，ReClipped 将自动与 Obsidian 重新同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, video autoplays when annotation page changed
ast.target: 如果启用，当标注页面切换时，视频将自动播放。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The ReClipped plugin enables automatic syncing of all your annotations from video platforms. Note: Requires ReClipped account.
ast.target: ReClipped 插件支持自动同步来自视频平台的所有标注。注意：需要 ReClipped 账户。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Sync your ReClipped data with Obsidian
ast.target: 将您的 ReClipped 数据与 Obsidian 同步

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Sync automatically when Obsidian opens

ast.name: setName
